current_style_assessment: The accepted v2 overview remains the protected benchmark. The v3 lane is a separate candidate focused on Panel C label readability and escape-curve breathing room.
human_question: Should the overview v3 restrained TikZ candidate be compared visually against accepted v2, refined further, or rejected while keeping v2 as the benchmark?

choices.label: Compare v3 against v2
choices.next_slice: compile v3, inspect Panel C crop, and prepare a visual comparison packet
choices.risk: does not approve acceptance, export, release, or golden mutation

choices.label: Refine v3 Panel C
choices.next_slice: open one additional bounded Panel C typography or line-routing pass
choices.risk: can improve readability but should stay inside source-only candidate scope

choices.label: Reject v3, keep v2
choices.next_slice: record rejection rationale and leave accepted v2 unchanged
choices.risk: figure quality remains at the current accepted benchmark

choices.label: Request editorial redesign benchmark
choices.next_slice: create broader visual alternatives as separate candidates before any source or release mutation
choices.risk: larger visual-language change requires stricter semantic comparison

follow_up.implementation_slice: Compile v3 and compare the rendered Panel C crop against the accepted v2 benchmark before any protected state change.
